testcase.name: test_register_new_user_still_works
testcase.failure: tests/test_iter8_p0.py:59: in test_register_new_user_still_works assert j["user"]["email"] == email E AssertionError: assert 'test_iter8_f...b@example.com' == 'TEST_iter8_f...b@example.com' E E - TEST_iter8_f0ccc8cb@example.com E ? ^^^^ E + test_iter8_f0ccc8cb@example.com E ? ^^^^

testcase.name: test_chat_conversations_list

failure.message: AssertionError: assert False + where False = isinstance({'items': [{'user_id': '6a573a577b203a05637f7d10', 'title': 'Describe this image in one sentence.', 'pinned': False, 'folder': None, ...}, {'user_id': '6a573a577b203a05637f7d10', 'title': 'What color is this favicon?', 'pinned': False, 'folder': None, ...}, {'user_id': '6a573a577b203a05637f7d10', 'title': 'Say hello in 5 words', 'pinned': False, 'folder': None, ...}]}, list) + where {'items': [{'user_id': '6a573a577b203a05637f7d10', 'title': 'Describe this image in one sentence.', 'pinned': False, 'folder': None, ...}, {'user_id': '6a573a577b203a05637f7d10', 'title': 'What color is this favicon?', 'pinned': False, 'folder': None, ...}, {'user_id': '6a573a577b203a05637f7d10', 'title': 'Say hello in 5 words', 'pinned': False, 'folder': None, ...}]} = json() + where json = <Response [200]>.json

testcase.failure: tests/test_iter8_p0.py:266: in test_chat_conversations_list assert isinstance(r.json(), list) E AssertionError: assert False E + where False = isinstance({'items': [{'user_id': '6a573a577b203a05637f7d10', 'title': 'Describe this image in one sentence.', 'pinned': False, 'folder': None, ...}, {'user_id': '6a573a577b203a05637f7d10', 'title': 'What color is this favicon?', 'pinned': False, 'folder': None, ...}, {'user_id': '6a573a577b203a05637f7d10', 'title': 'Say hello in 5 words', 'pinned': False, 'folder': None, ...}]}, list) E + where {'items': [{'user_id': '6a573a577b203a05637f7d10', 'title': 'Describe this image in one sentence.', 'pinned': False, 'folder': None, ...}, {'user_id': '6a573a577b203a05637f7d10', 'title': 'What color is this favicon?', 'pinned': False, 'folder': None, ...}, {'user_id': '6a573a577b203a05637f7d10', 'title': 'Say hello in 5 words', 'pinned': False, 'folder': None, ...}]} = json() E + where json = <Response [200]>.json
